PreToolUse.command: python -c "import sys, os; path = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_FILE_PATH', ''); allowed = ['aiStrat/', 'src/', 'prisma/']; sys.exit(0 if any(path.startswith(a) or path.startswith(os.path.join(os.getcwd(), a)) for a in allowed) or not path else 1)"
PreToolUse.description: Block modifications outside allowed directories (aiStrat/, src/, prisma/)

PostToolUse.command: python -c "import sys, os; path = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_FILE_PATH', ''); ext = os.path.splitext(path)[1]; sys.exit(0) if ext != '.py' else None; os.system(f'python -m py_compile {path}') or sys.exit(0)"
python aiStrat/scripts/quality_check.py > /dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'WARNING: Quality gate failed'
PostToolUse.description: Run quality gate after file modifications

SessionStart.command: python -c "import os, json; halt_path = os.path.join('.claude', 'HALT'); print(f'WARNING: Brain is HALTED — {json.load(open(halt_path))[\"reason\"]}') if os.path.exists(halt_path) else None"
SessionStart.description: Check for active Brain halt on session start
